title: [Icemule Trail, Tundra]
description: As you crest one of the larger foothills of the mountain range, you behold the vast, semi-frozen wasteland of the tundra spreading northward to the horizon.  The blowing snow makes progress difficult and adds to the urgency that tells you to push onward.

wayto.2515: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'north'
wayto.2517: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'south'
